name: World Prime Credit Card

domestic: 2 complimentary visits per quarter, unlocked by spending ₹35,000 or more in the preceding calendar quarter (excl. rental spends)

milestones.label: 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹1.5 Lakhs
10,000 additional bonus reward points on annual spend of ₹3.5 Lakhs

milestoneBenefits: Earn 10,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of ₹1.5 Lakhs
Earn additional 10,000 bonus points on annual spends of ₹3.5 Lakhs
additionalBenefits: Welcome benefit of 12,000 Reward Points upon payment of joining fee and spending ₹2,000 within 30 days of card issuance
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket on BookMyShow up to ₹200, twice a month
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit against the card bill.
No direct airline miles transfer — points are redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers through the RBL Rewards portal at ₹0.25 per point.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹150/month).

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
2X online reward points are capped at 1,000 bonus points per month.
Lounge access spend threshold calculation excludes rent payment transactions.
